name: scoring_format_id split by year on player-scoring-format-logs
description: Exercises the get_table_conditions vs extra_predicates path on scoring_format_player_seasonlogs with a year split active. When year split is active, the year predicate is dropped from get_table_conditions; only scoring_format_id remains. Coverage gap (e).
expected_query: with "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2022,2023]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years) select "player"."pid", player.first_name, player.last_name, "tf0d891b1f69e0b8ee39a5cf4baa48016"."points" AS "points_from_seasonlogs_0", "player_years"."year", "player"."primary_position" from "player" inner join "player_years" on "player_years"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "scoring_format_player_seasonlogs" as "tf0d891b1f69e0b8ee39a5cf4baa48016" on "tf0d891b1f69e0b8ee39a5cf4baa48016"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "tf0d891b1f69e0b8ee39a5cf4baa48016"."year" = "player_years"."year" and "tf0d891b1f69e0b8ee39a5cf4baa48016"."scoring_format_id" = 'draftkings' group by player.first_name, player.last_name, "tf0d891b1f69e0b8ee39a5cf4baa48016"."points", "player_years"."year", "player"."pid", "player"."last_name", "player"."first_name", "player"."primary_position" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 500
